requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容排放——ESA / IEC接轨标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容排放——ESA / IEC接軌標準

summary.en: The Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) adopts IEC and ITU standards as Ethiopian Standards (ES prefix). Wireless and IoT devices must meet ESA-adopted EMC emission limits aligned with CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 for multimedia equipment emissions, or equivalent IEC-based ES standards applicable to the product class. ESA standards are enforced at customs and in-market by the ESA in coordination with ECA. There is no mandatory ESA conformity mark for every product category, but ESA inspections at customs may check for technical standard compliance.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚标准局（ESA）采用IEC和ITU标准作为埃塞俄比亚标准（ES前缀）。无线及物联网设备须符合ESA采用的、与CISPR 32 / IEC 55032（多媒体设备排放）或适用于该产品类别的同等IEC基础ES标准接轨的电磁兼容排放限值。ESA标准由ESA与ECA协调，在清关和在市场层面执行。并非每个产品类别都有强制性ESA合规标志，但ESA在海关的检查可能核验技术标准合规情况。
summary.zht: 埃塞俄比亞標準局（ESA）採用IEC和ITU標準作為埃塞俄比亞標準（ES前綴）。無線及物聯網裝置須符合ESA採用的、與CISPR 32 / IEC 55032（多媒體設備排放）或適用於該產品類別的等同IEC基礎ES標準接軌的電磁相容排放限值。ESA標準由ESA與ECA協調，在清關和在市場層面執行。並非每個產品類別都有強制性ESA合規標誌，但ESA在海關的檢查可能核驗技術標準合規情況。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 (EMC requirements for multimedia equipment, emissions) — adopted by ESA

summary.en: China GB/T 9254 (based on CISPR 32) for EMC emissions of information technology equipment and multimedia equipment. GB/T 9254 is the China-domestic equivalent of CISPR 32 and is a mandatory CCC supporting standard for in-scope equipment. Test data from CNAS-accredited labs to GB/T 9254 may support ESA compliance arguments but is not automatically accepted.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 9254（基于CISPR 32）适用于信息技术设备和多媒体设备的电磁兼容排放。GB/T 9254是CISPR 32的中国境内等同标准，是相关设备强制CCC认证的配套标准。来自CNAS认可实验室的GB/T 9254测试数据可作为ESA合规的佐证依据，但不会被自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 9254（基於CISPR 32）適用於資訊技術設備和多媒體設備的電磁相容排放。GB/T 9254是CISPR 32的中國境內等同標準，是相關設備強制CCC認證的配套標準。來自CNAS認可實驗室的GB/T 9254測試數據可作為ESA合規的佐證依據，但不會被自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information Technology Equipment EMC Emissions (China, CISPR 32-based)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — supporting EMC test requirement (China)

gap.en: ESA adopts IEC/CISPR standards independently of China's GB standards. While GB/T 9254 is technically CISPR 32-aligned, ESA and ECA require compliance demonstrated against ESA-adopted standards, not GB. CNAS lab reports may be presented as supporting evidence but independent ESA-accepted test data is preferable. No CE self-declaration is accepted.
gap.zh: ESA独立于中国GB标准采用IEC/CISPR标准。尽管GB/T 9254在技术上与CISPR 32接轨，ESA和ECA要求依据ESA采用的标准而非GB标准证明合规。CNAS实验室报告可作为佐证材料提交，但优先提供ESA认可的独立测试数据。不接受CE自我声明。
gap.zht: ESA獨立於中國GB標準採用IEC/CISPR標準。儘管GB/T 9254在技術上與CISPR 32接軌，ESA和ECA要求依據ESA採用的標準而非GB標準證明合規。CNAS實驗室報告可作為佐證材料提交，但優先提供ESA認可的獨立測試數據。不接受CE自我聲明。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC emission compliance to ESA-adopted IEC/CISPR standards is required for wireless and IoT devices imported into Ethiopia. Chinese GB/T 9254 test data (CISPR 32-aligned) may support the application but does not substitute for ESA-accepted documentation. Verify current ESA requirements for the specific product class with a qualified regulatory consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进口至埃塞俄比亚的无线及物联网设备须符合ESA采用的IEC/CISPR电磁兼容排放标准。中国GB/T 9254测试数据（与CISPR 32接轨）可作为申请的佐证材料，但不能替代ESA认可的文件。请就具体产品类别的现行ESA要求咨询合格监管顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進口至埃塞俄比亞的無線及物聯網裝置須符合ESA採用的IEC/CISPR電磁相容排放標準。中國GB/T 9254測試數據（與CISPR 32接軌）可作為申請的佐證材料，但不能替代ESA認可的文件。請就具體產品類別的現行ESA要求諮詢合格監管顧問。

requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容抗扰度——ESA / IEC接轨标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容抗擾度——ESA / IEC接軌標準

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices imported into Ethiopia must meet EMC immunity requirements per ESA-adopted IEC standards, including IEC 61000-4 series tests (ESD, radiated immunity, EFT/burst, surge, conducted immunity) as applicable to the product class. ESA aligns its technical standards with IEC and ITU. Immunity compliance is expected as part of the overall technical conformance reviewed during ECA type approval and potential ESA inspection at customs.
summary.zh: 进口至埃塞俄比亚的无线及物联网设备须符合ESA采用的IEC标准的电磁兼容抗扰度要求，包括适用于该产品类别的IEC 61000-4系列测试（ESD、辐射抗扰度、EFT/突波、浪涌、传导抗扰度）。ESA将其技术标准与IEC和ITU接轨。抗扰度合规预期作为ECA型式批准技术合规审查及ESA海关潜在检查的整体组成部分。
summary.zht: 進口至埃塞俄比亞的無線及物聯網裝置須符合ESA採用的IEC標準的電磁相容抗擾度要求，包括適用於該產品類別的IEC 61000-4系列測試（ESD、輻射抗擾度、EFT/突波、浪湧、傳導抗擾度）。ESA將其技術標準與IEC和ITU接軌。抗擾度合規預期作為ECA型式批准技術合規審查及ESA海關潛在檢查的整體組成部分。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61000-4 series (EMC immunity tests) — adopted by ESA as ES standards
CISPR 35 / IEC 55035 (EMC requirements for multimedia equipment, immunity) — adopted by ESA
Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) technical standards catalogue

summary.en: China GB/T 17625 (based on IEC 61000-3 series) covers conducted emissions harmonic current and voltage fluctuation. GB/T 9254.2 (based on CISPR 35) covers immunity for multimedia equipment. These are supporting standards for CCC and apply domestically. IEC 61000-4 immunity test results from CNAS-accredited laboratories may be presented as supporting evidence for ESA requirements.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 17625（基于IEC 61000-3系列）涵盖传导排放谐波电流及电压波动。GB/T 9254.2（基于CISPR 35）涵盖多媒体设备的抗扰度。这些均为CCC配套标准，在境内适用。来自CNAS认可实验室的IEC 61000-4抗扰度测试结果可作为ESA要求的佐证材料提交。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 17625（基於IEC 61000-3系列）涵蓋傳導排放諧波電流及電壓波動。GB/T 9254.2（基於CISPR 35）涵蓋多媒體設備的抗擾度。這些均為CCC配套標準，在境內適用。來自CNAS認可實驗室的IEC 61000-4抗擾度測試結果可作為ESA要求的佐證材料提交。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17625 series — Conducted emissions, harmonic current, voltage fluctuation (China, IEC 61000-3-based)
GB/T 9254.2 — EMC immunity for multimedia equipment (China, CISPR 35-based)

gap.en: ESA requires immunity compliance per IEC 61000-4 series and CISPR 35 (IEC 55035) as adopted in ES standards. Chinese GB equivalent test data may be presented as supporting evidence, but ESA and ECA may require test reports explicitly referencing the applicable IEC or ES standard. No CE Declaration of Conformity is accepted as a substitute.
gap.zh: ESA依据其采用的ES标准要求符合IEC 61000-4系列和CISPR 35（IEC 55035）的抗扰度。中国GB等同测试数据可作为佐证材料提交，但ESA和ECA可能要求测试报告明确引用适用的IEC或ES标准。不接受CE符合性声明作为替代。
gap.zht: ESA依據其採用的ES標準要求符合IEC 61000-4系列和CISPR 35（IEC 55035）的抗擾度。中國GB等同測試數據可作為佐證材料提交，但ESA和ECA可能要求測試報告明確引用適用的IEC或ES標準。不接受CE符合性聲明作為替代。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity compliance to ESA-adopted IEC 61000-4 series and CISPR 35 (IEC 55035) standards is expected for wireless and IoT devices imported into Ethiopia. Chinese GB equivalent immunity test data may be used as supporting evidence. Verify specific ESA-adopted standards applicable to the product class with a qualified regulatory consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进口至埃塞俄比亚的无线及物联网设备预期须符合ESA采用的IEC 61000-4系列和CISPR 35（IEC 55035）电磁兼容抗扰度标准。中国GB等同抗扰度测试数据可作为佐证材料使用。请就适用于具体产品类别的现行ESA标准咨询合格监管顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進口至埃塞俄比亞的無線及物聯網裝置預期須符合ESA採用的IEC 61000-4系列和CISPR 35（IEC 55035）電磁相容抗擾度標準。中國GB等同抗擾度測試數據可作為佐證材料使用。請就適用於具體產品類別的現行ESA標準諮詢合格監管顧問。
